summary: Testing completed for Il Ricettario with LEFT DRAWER navigation (changed from bottom tabs). Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core drawer navigation features tested and working. Fixed critical bug: missing useNavigation import in folders.tsx. Minor navigation issue found with router.push path.

react_native_issues.note: Minor deprecation warning, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: MongoDB ObjectId excluded from responses
✓ Frontend: LEFT DRAWER navigation implemented correctly
✓ Frontend: All drawer menu items working (Home, Aggiungi Ricetta, Cartelle, Modifica Nome)
✓ Frontend: Hamburger menu button positioned top-left as required
✓ Frontend: User name displayed in drawer and editable via 'Modifica Nome'
✓ Frontend: All interactive elements have testID attributes
✓ Frontend: Proper React Native components used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity)
✓ Frontend: Search functionality working on home screen
✓ Frontend: Recipe detail page has edit and transcribe buttons
FIXED: Missing useNavigation and DrawerActions imports in folders.tsx
FIXED: Incorrect router.push path in add.tsx (changed from /(tabs) to /(drawer))
seed_data_creation: Existing test data used: TEST_Mario profile, TEST_Tiramisu recipes, Dolci and Primi Piatti folders. Backend tests create and cleanup their own test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation changed from bottom tabs to LEFT DRAWER (hamburger menu). All drawer navigation features working correctly. Video extraction and transcription will fail for test URLs (expected - requires real Instagram/Facebook content). The app gracefully handles these failures. Profile exists with name 'TEST_Mario'.

performance_notes: Backend responds quickly (<200ms for most endpoints). Frontend loads smoothly on mobile viewport (375x667). Drawer animations smooth. No performance issues detected.
security_notes: No authentication required as per requirements. MongoDB connection secured via environment variables. No sensitive data exposed in responses.
